title: Random Placement
description: This lightweight mod adds the ability to randomly place blocks from the hotbar!
body:
![Random Placement Preview](https://i.imgur.com/GMIHwnE.png)

A lightweight client-side Fabric mod that automatically switches your hotbar slot after placing blocks.

The mod is designed for fast building and random block placement patterns without manually changing slots.

## Features

* Random hotbar block selection
* Smart weighted placement system
* Fully customizable slot chances
* Pattern-based placement mode
* Overlay icon near crosshair
* Configurable rules and behavior
* Mod Menu support
* Client-side only

## Modes

* **Random** — pure random block selection
* **Smart** — avoids repetitive placements
* **Custom** — weighted chances and advanced rules
* **Pattern** — follows a custom pattern string

## Default Keybind

* Press **R** to enable/disable Random Placement mode.
